headline: Raymond James Upgrades Essex Property Trust (ESS), Citing Strong Bay Area Growth
summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. On June 26, Raymond James upgraded Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) to Outperform from Market Perform. It set a $320 price target on the stock. The firm believes Essex is the residential real estate company best positioned […]
